free_text: Measurement of 12C fragmentation cross sections on
C, O, and H in the energy range of interest for
Dipartimento di Scienze di Base e Applicate
The PS detectors (STSa and STSb) measure the
time-of-flight of fragments. They are placed at
90 degree (Arm1) and 60 degree (Arm2) angles to the
incoming beam direction. Each PS detector is followed
by an LYSO crystal to measure the energy deposited by
